name: Hummingbird Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, salt, and sugar.
2. Stir in cinnamon, eggs, oil, and vanilla until moistened but not beaten.
3. Fold in crushed pineapple and pecans; mix well.
4. Pour batter into greased 9-inch pans.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
6. Cool in pans for 10 minutes, then remove and cool on wire racks.
7. Stir remaining pecans into cream cheese frosting before serving.
